    R

    removeElement(Object[], int) - Static method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.Array.ArrayUtils
    Remove's one element from an array, by its order index.
    render(String, int) - Method in class CaetanoSoft.Utilities.UI.SplashScreenManager.SplashScreenManager
    Draws on the splash screen text and a progress bar.
